13-15. O Brahmin, the quantum of gains will correspond to the number of
th
Grahas in, or giving a Drishti to the 11 from Lagn Pad. If there is Argala
th
for the said 11 , there will be more gains, while a benefic Argala will bring
still more gains. If the said benefic, causing Argala is in his exaltation Rāśi,
th
the gains will be still higher. If the said 11 receives a Drishti from a benefic
th
from Lagn, the 9 etc., gains will increase in the ascending order. In all
th
these cases, the 12 from Pad should simultaneously be free from malefic
th
association. A benefic, placed in Lagn, giving a Drishti to the 11 from
th
Arudh Lagn will be still beneficial. If the Drishti is from the 9 from Lagn, it
will confer much more gains.
th
16-17. Pad and Financial Losses (up to Sloka 21). If the 12 from Lagn
Pad receives a Drishti from, or is yuti with both benefics and malefics, there
will be abundant earnings, but plenty of expenses.
